meanings.definition: outward or visible aspect of a person or thing
the event of coming into sight
formal attendance (in court or at a hearing) of a party in an action

examples: I tried to describe his appearance to the police

meanings.definition: the act of appearing in public view
examples: the rookie made a brief appearance in the first period
it was Bernhardt's last appearance in America

meanings.definition: pretending that something is the case in order to make a good impression
examples: they try to keep up appearances
that ceremony is just for show
